infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: RunAm Rider needs your location to receive nearby tasks and navigate to pickups.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: RunAm Rider needs background location to track active deliveries.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: RunAm Rider needs camera access for document verification and delivery proof.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow RunAm Rider to use your location to navigate deliveries.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow RunAm Rider to access your camera for verification.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow RunAm Rider to access your photos for document uploads.
